tool.name: EnzyWizard HydroCluster
tool.description: Detect hydrophobic clusters from a cleaned protein structure
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-HydroCluster**
Detects hydrophobic clusters from a cleaned protein structure based on residue-residue hydrophobic contacts among ILE, VAL, and LEU residues.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with hydrophobic cluster statistics.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-hydrocluster` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-hydrocluster
